purpose: Pre-activation governance for Lane_04 (boot 2026-04-30). Three deliverables: (1) publish laws/LAW-NTS-LANE-4_v1.md (Social + Real User Testing operating law, dual-LLM Gemini+Copilot pattern); (2) update LAW_INDEX_MASTER NHÓM 4 (1→2 files); (3) update Reality Audit phantom count (1→2 LAW-NTS-LANE-* materialised, 8 remaining).

post_merge_observation.title: reports/** not in sync_runtime_to_public.yml whitelist; AC8 BLOCKED-by-design
post_merge_observation.evidence: AC1 (LAW Lane_04) + AC2 (LAW_INDEX_MASTER) both 200 OK on Live mirror. AC3 (reality audit phantom-count update) lives at reports/LANE01-AIER-CODE-REALITY-AUDIT-V1_REPORT.md → returns 404 from Live mirror because reports/** is NOT in the sync whitelist. The update IS in private Uniton_Shared at this PR's merge commit (verifiable via gh api).
post_merge_observation.root_cause: Sync whitelist intentionally narrow — only specific dirs (audits/ecosystem/**, system_maps/**, handoffs/inbox/**, laws/**) plus root-level governance files are mirrored. reports/ contains 60+ files from many tasks, some with operational details from older eras; blanket-mirroring would re-trigger INC-01-class risk on legacy content.
post_merge_observation.decision_path_for_NTS: Three options: (1) accept AC8 as BLOCKED-by-design (most conservative — matches private-repo-URL precedent from LANE01-AIER-CODE-UZG-PLUS-RUNTIME-NAMESPACE-V1 AC14); (2) selective mirror — add only specific report files to whitelist; (3) blanket reports/** — needs prior secret-scan of 60+ files. CLAC1 default = option 1 unless NTS directs otherwise.
post_merge_observation.non_blocker_for_lane_04_activation: Lane_04 first-boot read of LAW v1.0 + LAW_INDEX both work via Live mirror (the two artefacts that matter for activation). The reality-audit phantom-count update is informational only — it tells the audit's reader 'there are 2 materialised phantoms now' but the LAW + INDEX files are the canonical surface.
